ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-13-2018 Continued To Jul-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The matter was called at 9;30 a.m. and no appearance was made by the Admistrator or her Attorney. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on July 16, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date. The petition must be filed no later than July 9, 2018

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Reyes. Not reported.

Petition For Final Distribution On Waiver Of Account And For Allowance Of Attorney Statutory Fees
Off Calendar Nov-08-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar Oct-17-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar Sep-13-2017 Continued To Oct-17-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sammie Dukes for Lizz Holman.

The Court noted that Lizz Holman was not present. Mr. Dukes stated that she sent him an e-mail indicating that she would be engaging an Attorney, that he hasn't received any notice and provided a copy of the e-mail and his response to the Court. The Court informed Counsel that it is not inclined to grant the motion until it is determined if he can help Ms. Holman or she gets new Counsel. Mr. Dukes stated that there is a complete breakdown in trust and loyalty, that he can not be liable for Ms. Holman, that she does not want to follow his recommendations and that he can't control the Client. The Court noted that the e-mail is from Ms. Holman's Sister. Mr. Dukes stated that the Sister sends e-mails for Lizz, that Ms. Holman is carbon copied on the e-mail and that he responded directly to Ms. Holman, but got no response. Mr. Dukes also stated that they wanted him to handle the Mother's estate, but they were displeased with the statutory fees, that the Administrator filed a petition for Margaret Ann Holman's estate and that he is declining what they are proposing in the e mail. The Motion to Be Relieved As Counsel is continued to October 17, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Probate Examiner will notify Ms. Holman and order her to appear.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
